creator: ryo@tetera.org
text:
Created attachment 150015
Screen shot of last messages

Panasonic CF-R3 is i386 machine.
Using FreeBSD-10.1-RELEASE-i386-memstick.img.xz, FreeBSD does not boot.
Last message is the following.

agp1: <Intel 82855GME (855GME GMCH) SCGA controller> on vgapci0
panic: make_dev_credv: bad si_name (error 17, si_name=agpgart)
cpuid = 0
KDB: (snap)

NetBSD/i386 6.1.5 boots without problem.
The attached JPEG file is screen shot of last messages.

dmesg output from NetBSD/i386 6.1.5 is the following.
